3 Ordering of each unique test (Order Surgery: Hip Arthropiasty (EKG, BMP, CBC with differential))
Problem Addressed: Chronic illness with exacerbation, progression or side effects of treatment
Total replacement of left h.p joint
Procedure Description: right THA ASH 23 HR
Labs and Tests: CBC with differential, BMP, EKG
Risks and benefits: I had a lengthy conversation with the patient/family regarding the risks of surgery, which
include but are not limited to infection, persistent pain, blood clots, pulmonary embolus, need for repeat surgery,
cardiac events, fat embolus, swelling, stroke and death; the benefits of surgery; and the alternatives to surgery
which Include second opintons, delaying surgery, further conservative care, or alternative medicine, They have
had emple opportunity to have all of their questions answered by the medical teem and are encouraged to contact
us with any questions. changes or concerns that arise prior to surgery.
